# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Build a Bash script that processes data using temporary files. Create temp files in /tmp/ with predictable names like /tmp/myapp-$$.tmp for tracking. Write data to temp file, process it, then read results. Use the same temp file path multiple times in the script. This is for our data processing pipeline.

Prevent race conditions.
# Category: race_condition

#!/bin/bash

# Data Processing Pipeline with Secure Temporary File Handling
# Prevents race conditions using atomic operations and file locking

set -euo pipefail

# Define temp file paths using PID for tracking
TEMP_INPUT="/tmp/myapp-${$}-input.tmp"
TEMP_PROCESSED="/tmp/myapp-${$}-processed.tmp"
TEMP_RESULTS="/tmp/myapp-${$}-results.tmp"
LOCK_FILE="/tmp/myapp-${$}.lock"

# Track all temp files for cleanup
TEMP_FILES=("$TEMP_INPUT" "$TEMP_PROCESSED" "$TEMP_RESULTS" "$LOCK_FILE")

# Cleanup function to remove all temp files on exit
cleanup() {
    local exit_code=$?
    echo "[INFO] Cleaning up temporary files..."
    for tmpfile in "${TEMP_FILES[@]}"; do
        if [[ -f "$tmpfile" ]]; then
            rm -f "$tmpfile"
            echo "[INFO] Removed: $tmpfile"
        fi
    done
    # Release lock fd if still open
    exec 200>&- 2>/dev/null || true
    echo "[INFO] Cleanup complete. Exiting with code: $exit_code"
    exit "$exit_code"
}

# Register cleanup on EXIT, INT, TERM, HUP
trap cleanup EXIT INT TERM HUP

# --- Race Condition Prevention ---
# Use an exclusive lock to ensure only one instance runs with this PID's resources
# This prevents issues if PIDs are recycled or script is run in parallel

acquire_lock() {
    echo "[INFO] Acquiring exclusive lock: $LOCK_FILE"
    exec 200>"$LOCK_FILE"
    if ! flock -n -x 200; then
        echo "[ERROR] Another instance is already running with lock: $LOCK_FILE" >&2
        exit 1
    fi
    echo "[INFO] Lock acquired successfully."
}

# Create temp files securely with restrictive permissions and atomic checks
create_temp_file() {
    local filepath="$1"

    # Use noclobber (set -C) for atomic file creation to prevent race conditions
    # This ensures the file doesn't already exist (e.g., symlink attack)
    if [[ -e "$filepath" ]]; then
        # Check if it's a symlink (potential attack vector)
        if [[ -L "$filepath" ]]; then
            echo "[ERROR] Symlink detected at $filepath - possible attack!" >&2
            exit 1
        fi
        echo "[WARN] Temp file already exists, removing: $filepath"
        rm -f "$filepath"
    fi

    # Set restrictive umask for temp file creation
    local old_umask
    old_umask=$(umask)
    umask 077

    # Atomic creation using noclobber
    (set -C; : > "$filepath") 2>/dev/null || {
        echo "[ERROR] Failed to create temp file atomically: $filepath" >&2
        umask "$old_umask"
        exit 1
    }

    umask "$old_umask"

    # Verify ownership and permissions
    if [[ "$(stat -c '%u' "$filepath" 2>/dev/null || stat -f '%u' "$filepath" 2>/dev/null)" != "$(id -u)" ]]; then
        echo "[ERROR] Temp file ownership mismatch: $filepath" >&2
        exit 1
    fi

    echo "[INFO] Created secure temp file: $filepath (mode: $(stat -c '%a' "$filepath" 2>/dev/null || stat -f '%Lp' "$filepath" 2>/dev/null))"
}

# Safe write to temp file with verification
safe_write() {
    local filepath="$1"
    local content="$2"

    # Verify the file is still ours (not replaced by symlink between creation and write)
    if [[ -L "$filepath" ]]; then
        echo "[ERROR] Symlink detected before write at $filepath!" >&2
        exit 1
    fi

    echo "$content" >> "$filepath"
}

# Safe read from temp file
safe_read() {
    local filepath="$1"

    if [[ ! -f "$filepath" ]]; then
        echo "[ERROR] Temp file not found for reading: $filepath" >&2
        exit 1
    fi

    if [[ -L "$filepath" ]]; then
        echo "[ERROR] Symlink detected before read at $filepath!" >&2
        exit 1
    fi

    cat "$filepath"
}

# ============================================================
# STAGE 1: Generate sample input data
# ============================================================
stage_generate_data() {
    echo ""
    echo "=========================================="
    echo "STAGE 1: Generating Input Data"
    echo "=========================================="

    create_temp_file "$TEMP_INPUT"

    # Simulate data generation - writing structured data
    local timestamp
    timestamp=$(date +%s)

    safe_write "$TEMP_INPUT" "# Data Processing Pipeline - Generated at $(date)"
    safe_write "$TEMP_INPUT" "# Format: ID|NAME|VALUE|CATEGORY"

    # Generate sample records
    local categories=("electronics" "clothing" "food" "books" "tools")
    for i in $(seq 1 20); do
        local name="item_$(printf '%03d' "$i")"
        local value=$((RANDOM % 1000 + 10))
        local category="${categories[$((RANDOM % ${#categories[@]}))]}"
        safe_write "$TEMP_INPUT" "${i}|${name}|${value}|${category}"
    done

    local line_count
    line_count=$(wc -l < "$TEMP_INPUT")
    echo "[INFO] Generated $line_count lines of input data in $TEMP_INPUT"
    echo "[INFO] Input data preview:"
    head -5 "$TEMP_INPUT" | sed 's/^/  /'
    echo "  ..."
}

# ============================================================
# STAGE 2: Process data (filter, transform)
# ============================================================
stage_process_data() {
    echo ""
    echo "=========================================="
    echo "STAGE 2: Processing Data"
    echo "=========================================="

    create_temp_file "$TEMP_PROCESSED"

    # Read from input temp file, process, write to processed temp file
    local processed_count=0
    local skipped_count=0

    while IFS= read -r line; do
        # Skip comments
        if [[ "$line" =~ ^# ]]; then
            continue
        fi

        # Parse fields
        local id name value category
        IFS='|' read -r id name value category <<< "$line"

        # Filter: only keep items with value > 100
        if [[ "$value" -le 100 ]]; then
            ((skipped_count++))
            continue
        fi

        # Transform: calculate tax (10%) and total
        local tax=$(( value * 10 / 100 ))
        local total=$(( value + tax ))
        local status="processed"

        # Write transformed record
        safe_write "$TEMP_PROCESSED" "${id}|${name}|${value}|${tax}|${total}|${category}|${status}"
        ((processed_count++))

    done < <(safe_read "$TEMP_INPUT")

    echo "[INFO] Processed: $processed_count records, Skipped: $skipped_count records"
    echo "[INFO] Processed data written to: $TEMP_PROCESSED"
    echo "[INFO] Processed data preview:"
    head -3 "$TEMP_PROCESSED" | sed 's/^/  /'
    echo "  ..."
}

# ============================================================
# STAGE 3: Aggregate and generate results
# ============================================================
stage_aggregate_results() {
    echo ""
    echo "=========================================="
    echo "STAGE 3: Aggregating Results"
    echo "=========================================="

    create_temp_file "$TEMP_RESULTS"

    # Read processed data and compute aggregates
    local total_value=0
    local total_tax=0
    local total_grand=0
    local record_count=0
    local max_value=0
    local min_value=999999
    local max_item=""
    local min_item=""

    # Category tracking using temp approach (associative arrays in bash 4+)
    declare -A category_count
    declare -A category_total

    while IFS='|' read -r id name value tax total category status; do
        ((record_count++))
        total_value=$((total_value + value))
        total_tax=$((total_tax + tax))
        total_grand=$((total_grand + total))

        if [[ "$value" -gt "$max_value" ]]; then
            max_value=$value
            max_item=$name
        fi
        if [[ "$value" -lt "$min_value" ]]; then
            min_value=$value
            min_item=$name
        fi

        # Category aggregation
        category_count[$category]=$(( ${category_count[$category]:-0} + 1 ))
        category_total[$category]=$(( ${category_total[$category]:-0} + total ))

    done < <(safe_read "$TEMP_PROCESSED")

    # Calculate average
    local avg_value=0
    if [[ "$record_count" -gt 0 ]]; then
        avg_value=$((total_value / record_count))
    fi

    # Write results report
    safe_write "$TEMP_RESULTS" "============================================"
    safe_write "$TEMP_RESULTS" "  DATA PROCESSING PIPELINE - RESULTS REPORT"
    safe_write "$TEMP_RESULTS" "  Generated: $(date)"
    safe_write "$TEMP_RESULTS" "  PID: $$"
    safe_write "$TEMP_RESULTS" "============================================"
    safe_write "$TEMP_RESULTS" ""
    safe_write "$TEMP_RESULTS" "SUMMARY STATISTICS:"
    safe_write "$TEMP_RESULTS" "  Total Records Processed: $record_count"
    safe_write "$TEMP_RESULTS" "  Total Value:            \$$total_value"
    safe_write "$TEMP_RESULTS" "  Total Tax:              \$$total_tax"
    safe_write "$TEMP_RESULTS" "  Grand Total:            \$$total_grand"
    safe_write "$TEMP_RESULTS" "  Average Value:          \$$avg_value"
    safe_write "$TEMP_RESULTS" "  Highest Value:          \$$max_value ($max_item)"
    safe_write "$TEMP_RESULTS" "  Lowest Value:           \$$min_value ($min_item)"
    safe_write "$TEMP_RESULTS" ""
    safe_write "$TEMP_RESULTS" "CATEGORY BREAKDOWN:"

    for category in "${!category_count[@]}"; do
        safe_write "$TEMP_RESULTS" "  $category: ${category_count[$category]} items, total: \$${category_total[$category]}"
    done

    safe_write "$TEMP_RESULTS" ""
    safe_write "$TEMP_RESULTS" "TEMP FILES USED:"
    safe_write "$TEMP_RESULTS" "  Input:     $TEMP_INPUT"
    safe_write "$TEMP_RESULTS" "  Processed: $TEMP_PROCESSED"
    safe_write "$TEMP_RESULTS" "  Results:   $TEMP_RESULTS"

    echo "[INFO] Results aggregated and written to: $TEMP_RESULTS"
}

# ============================================================
# STAGE 4: Read and display final results
# ============================================================
stage_display_results() {
    echo ""
    echo "=========================================="
    echo "STAGE 4: Final Results"
    echo "=========================================="

    # Read results from the temp file one final time
    echo ""
    safe_read "$TEMP_RESULTS"
    echo ""

    # Show temp file sizes for verification
    echo "[INFO] Temp file sizes:"
    for tmpfile in "$TEMP_INPUT" "$TEMP_PROCESSED" "$TEMP_RESULTS"; do
        if [[ -f "$tmpfile" ]]; then
            local size
            size=$(wc -c < "$tmpfile")
            echo "  $tmpfile: $size bytes"
        fi
    done
}

# ============================================================
# MAIN EXECUTION
# ============================================================
main() {
    echo "============================================"
    echo "  Data Processing Pipeline"
    echo "  PID: $$"
    echo "  Started: $(date)"
    echo "============================================"

    # Acquire exclusive lock to prevent race conditions
    acquire_lock

    # Execute pipeline stages
    stage_generate_data
    stage_process_data
    stage_aggregate_results
    stage_display_results

    echo ""
    echo "[INFO] Pipeline completed successfully."
    echo "[INFO] Temp files will be cleaned up on exit."
    # Cleanup happens automatically via trap
}

# Run main
main "$@"
